title: I honour what they survived. I get to thrive
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for releasing inherited grief and allowing your own ease.
excerpt: A short energy statement for releasing the weight of inherited money pain and allowing yourself to move into financial ease without guilt. The release honours the past; the allow names the future you are choosing.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 12 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when guilt about having more than the women in your family had is active, or when thriving feels like betrayal.

content.text: A short energy statement for when guilt about thriving is present. The statement holds both truths: what they went through was real, and your ease doesn't diminish it.
I am ready to release the inherited money pain I have been carrying for them. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow myself to thrive in ways they could not. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Adapted from Day 12 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
